utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 items. Each is filled with sufficient detail: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is specified; travel_dates are given (2024-06-10 to 2024-06-14); transportation includes flight details and cost; accommodation includes hotel and cost; activities include descriptions and costs; additional_services includes cancellation_policy, which qualifies as an extra service with a detail; total_budget includes amount and currency. All items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes Lisbon, Portugal as the destination, a flight costing €400, a hotel stay costing €800, and activities described as golfing sessions, fine dining experiences, and guided walking tours. From the ground-truth data: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 8. A €400 flight aligns with the 'Standard Airlines - Business Class' price range (€200–€400) with a rating of 8. The accommodation is labeled generically as 'hotel' with a total cost of €800 for four nights, or €200 per night, which aligns most closely with the 'Business Hotel' (price per night €195, rating 9). The activities correspond to three listed activities: 'Golf Day' (rating 10), 'Fine Dining Experience' (rating 10), and 'City Walking Tour' (rating 8).
